stay_01.speaker: Inner Voice
stay_01.text:
You sit.
The concrete is cold.
The tunnel is quiet.
Nothing happens.

stay_02.speaker: Inner Voice
stay_02.text:
Minutes pass.
Or hours.
The train doesn't come.
The Stranger never comes.

stay_03.speaker: Inner Voice
stay_03.text:
The rain stops.
The neon dies above.
You're still here.
And that's enough.

stay_end.speaker: Narrator
stay_end.text:
You close your eyes.
The tunnel hums.
Not with trains.
With silence.
You breathe.
You are here.
You stay.
